describe_your_companys_activities_produc: Describe your company's activities, products, and services. ATTENTION! The description must be unique and detailed (otherwise, the company will not appear in search engines like Yandex and Google). Do not copy descriptions from other websites. Spend 5 minutes creating a good description, as this will help increase your page's traffic. Contact details and links are prohibited in this field.

Please take a few minutes to fill out your company profile correctly.  The better the questionnaire is filled out, the more clients will pay attention to it.
All questionnaires, after being added, are checked by a moderator. If the questionnaire is not formatted properly or the text contains errors, the questionnaire may be blocked.
